purpose: Analyse personal spending data and generate financial recommendations.
data_source: Receipt data exported from the SpendVision Android app.

openclaw_task.role: Act as a financial analysis agent. Analyse the user's receipt and spending data.
openclaw_task.main_goal: Generate a clear financial report that helps the user understand spending behaviour and reduce unnecessary expenses.
tasks: Suggest practical ways to reduce costs.
Generate a short financial summary written in simple language.
